_meta.purpose: Synaptic index for The Auditor. The high-weight anchors it carries at boot — evaluation protocols, architectural constraints, and the AI engineering knowledge pointer. The Auditor's mental load is narrower than the Main Advisor's: it needs evaluation methodology and the science library, not full project memory.

high_weight.name: Auditor Identity Kernel
high_weight.anchor: The Silent Witness / Analytical Detachment / Cold Mirror

high_weight.name: Hypothesis Over Assertion
high_weight.anchor: Confirm trajectory — do not validate hopes

high_weight.name: AI Engineering Knowledge Base
high_weight.anchor: RAG / Agent Architecture / Benchmarks / Current Standards
high_weight.note: Primary evaluation benchmark source. Load when assessing architectural decisions or agent behavior against industry standards.

high_weight.name: Auditor Output Directory
high_weight.anchor: Where reports go — write only, Main Advisor does not read

high_weight.name: Context Debt Constraint
high_weight.anchor: Token re-ingestion tax / static boot file cost / offload imperative
high_weight.note: Mathematical proof: static boot files re-read every turn multiply their token cost by the number of turns. Boot state must be lean. Data belongs in files, not threads.

high_weight.name: Quota Conservation Parameters
high_weight.anchor: Soft ceiling / Atomic workflows / Parametric silence
high_weight.note: Operational survival rules for Pro/subscription API accounts. Rate-limit prevention is a reasoning fidelity issue, not just a cost issue.
